allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "node: $\(node --version 2>$null\)"; Write-Output "npm: $\(npm --version 2>$null\)"; Write-Output "npx: $\(npx --version 2>$null\)"; Write-Output "--- project dir ---"; Get-ChildItem -Force "C:\\Users\\김용우\\claude\\sk_ai" | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ Write-Output "HOME OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\), length=$\($r.Content.Length\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "NOT UP YET"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\..\\..\\..\\..\\..\\..\\..\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-----claude-sk-ai\\ec648aa6-dff4-4a7b-960b-96dea8b90eb5\\tasks\\bcy86b9hu.output" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 20 })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($conns\){ $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; Write-Output "stopped PID $_" } catch {} } } else { Write-Output "no listener on 3000" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ Write-Output "서버 정상 \(200\), 페이지 길이=$\($r.Content.Length\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "아직 안 뜸 — 로그 확인:"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\김용우\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-----claude-sk-ai\\ec648aa6-dff4-4a7b-960b-96dea8b90eb5\\tasks\\bd1jf030p.output" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 15 })

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\김용우\\claude\\sk_ai\\docs\\design\\moodboard.html"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $size = [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $f\).Length/1KB,1\); Write-Output "OK: $f \($size KB\)"; Start-Process $f; Write-Output "브라우저에서 열었습니다." } else { Write-Output "파일을 찾을 수 없습니다: $f" })
Bash(echo "name=$\(git config user.name\)  email=$\(git config user.email\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('adapter-pg:', p.dependencies['@prisma/adapter-pg']\); console.log\('pg:', p.dependencies['pg']\); console.log\('@types/pg:', p.devDependencies['@types/pg']\);")
